title: Extract grip orchestration runners
goal: Move Mechanic and Captain sequence/orchestration logic out of grabowski_grips.py into a dedicated orchestration module without changing action authority semantics.

acceptance.assertion: Mechanic and Captain sequence logic lives outside the core grip surface file.
Generic run_grip dispatch remains runner-agnostic and has no runner-name special cases.
The refactor does not add merge, deploy, service restart, fleet mutation, cleanup or secret authority.

metadata.reason: Keep boundary and Captain authority slices focused before structural extraction.
